title: thymelaea myrtifolia
intro: Thymelaea myrtifolia, also known as the spiny samphire or sea spurge, is a thorny, flowering shrub native to the Mediterranean region and the Atlantic coast of Europe. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain thymelagic acid and have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Thymelaea myrtifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases, such as bronchitis and asthma. Thymelaea myrtifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its seeds are also used in capsule form to harness its medicinal properties.
